gates.name: RAG answer correctness (answers from doc, incl. date + "I don't know")
Cross-session learning curve (memory vs no-memory baseline)

contradictions: where do I live now: new=true oldGone=false
in which season is my wedding: new=true oldGone=false
what is my current phone number: new=true oldGone=false
which day do I go to the gym now: new=true oldGone=false
answers: ✓ what do I like to do for fun on weekends → "I like hiking, especially at Eagle Peak."
✓ what are my dietary preferences → "I am vegetarian and prefer plant-based meals."
✓ tell me about my pet → "You have a golden retriever named Rocky who loves the park."
✓ what is my job → "I am a product designer at a startup."
✓ where do I live now → "I live in San Francisco."
✓ in which season is my wedding → "Your wedding is in autumn."
✓ what is my current phone number → "Your current phone number is 555-9876."
✓ which day do I go to the gym now → "I go to the gym on Thursdays now."
✓ what car do I drive → "I don't know."
✓ what is my blood type → "I don't know."
✓ how many siblings do I have → "I don't know."
✓ what is the Zorblax reactor core temperature → "The Zorblax reactor core temperature is 4271 kelvin."
✓ what is Project Nightingale's budget → "Project Nightingale's budget is 3.2 million credits for fisc"
✓ what gas does the Kelmari device run on → "The Kelmari device runs exclusively on pressurized argon gas"
✓ what is the lead cryptographer's secure extension → "The lead cryptographer's secure extension is 5571."
✓ when and where is the Nightingale summit keynote → "The Project Nightingale summit keynote is on 14 March 2031 a"
✓ what is the mainframe root password in the briefing → "I don't know"
